title: Login page not loading
description: Customer reports that the login page keeps loading indefinitely on mobile devices.

title: Payment failed but amount deducted
description: User was charged via card but order status shows unpaid.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Reset password email is not being received after multiple attempts.

title: Profile picture upload error
description: User receives a file format error when uploading a valid JPG image.

title: Dashboard statistics incorrect
description: Sales numbers are not matching with the backend reports.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Android users report the app closes immediately after opening.

title: Email notifications not working
description: Customer does not receive order confirmation emails.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Search results take more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Incorrect invoice generated
description: Invoice shows wrong product quantity after checkout.

title: Language switch not saving
description: Selected language resets to default after page refresh.

title: Coupon code invalid error
description: Valid promo code shows invalid error during checkout.

title: Order history missing
description: Customer cannot see previous orders in account dashboard.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: OTP code expires too quickly before user can enter it.

title: Broken image on homepage banner
description: Main promotional banner image does not load properly.

title: Account gets logged out automatically
description: User session expires within 5 minutes without inactivity.
